title: autobench.cycle.requested v1
description: Inbound trigger fired by a producer (hearth-loom loomie, tengine autoshader, tachyonac trade thesis, operator) to launch one autobench cycle on a target domain. The TriggerDaemon subscribes to this channel and runs a PopulationRunner cycle in-process. correlation_id is the routing key the caller uses to match the autobench.cycle.report.v1 emitted at cycle end. Domain values match BenchmarkRegistry domain names (codeforces_tier1, multifile_refactor, shader_tier1, ...) but the pattern is open so adding a new domain does not require bumping this schema. Override fields let the producer tune cycle parameters; absent overrides defer to autobench's env-var defaults (AUTOBENCH_ADVOCATES, AUTOBENCH_MAX_ITER, AUTOBENCH_BUDGET_SECONDS, ...). Source: /autobench.

correlation_id.description: ULID (Crockford base32, 26 chars). Caller routes the matching autobench.cycle.report.v1 by joining on this field.

requested_by.description: Lowercase project identity that emitted this request, e.g. 'hearth-loom', 'tengine', 'tachyonac', 'operator'.

domain.description: Target benchmark domain. Must resolve to a BenchmarkRegistry domain name. Open pattern (not enum) so future domains do not bump the schema. Known values today: codeforces_tier1, multifile_refactor, shader_tier1.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the request was emitted (mirrors the envelope time).

bead_id.description: Optional. Tracker bead this cycle is attributed to. When present, closes the Forge bench_completed handshake on accepted promotion.

n_advocates.description: Optional override. Number of parallel HarnessConfig lineages. Defaults to AUTOBENCH_ADVOCATES env (3) when absent.

max_iter.description: Optional override. RSI iteration cap per advocate. Defaults to AUTOBENCH_MAX_ITER env (5) when absent.

budget_seconds.description: Optional override. Per-advocate wall-clock budget in seconds. Defaults to AUTOBENCH_BUDGET_SECONDS env (1800) when absent.

target_skill.description: Optional. Curriculum difficulty target in [0, 1]. Used by AUTOBENCH_CURRICULUM=1 path.

adversarial_ratio.description: Optional override. Fraction of cases replaced with adversarial gotchas this cycle (wire-pop Phase 3).

judges_per_case.description: Optional override. JudgingPool ensemble size per case (wire-pop Phase 4).

improver_strategy.description: Optional override. Multi-improver aggregation strategy (wire-pop Phase 6).

notes.description: Optional operator-supplied context. Echoed unchanged into the matching report for trace continuity.
